title: Ben 10 Classic Datapack
description: Become a hero with this datapack!
body:
Hello everyone! This is my new datapack about Ben 10!
This is a datapack from the legacy series! (Which in the future will include af uaf and ov)

-**Beggining**

(All recipes can be found in the craft table)

To craft a remote you need to place all the ingredients in the workbench like this:

![craft remote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63cf0edf7854c8c448be7019fd0c9a5308ab9e4d.png)

After use, a capsule will fly into you containing the Omnitrix.

When you get the omnitrix you won't have all the aliens, to get the rest you need to scan the mobs.

For example Heatblast - is blaze. (you just have to approach them)

-**Omnitrix**

Right mouse button on 9 slot for activating the omnitrix and choosing an alien.

When you have chosen the alien you like, hold shift and press right mouse button to transform.

-**Aliens**

All aliens have 5 abilities that start with 1 slot.

**Description of all aliens coming soon**

-**Items**

- Annihilarrgh - Universe destroying object.
- Ascalon - A sword that gives super strength and armor.
- Badges - Beautiful Omnitrix Emlems.
- Blocker - You can block someone's omnitrix.
- Charms of Bezel - Stones that drop from the Hex and give effects.
- Hazmat Suit - Saves in space and from corrosion.
- Id Mask - You can turn into: a cow, a chicken, a villager and a zombie.
- Prototool - A tool with 10 modes.
- Plumber Suit - Saves in space.
- Remote - Summons the omnitrix.
- Spellbook - There are 6 spells.
- Staff of Ages - 4 magical abilities. Can also be combined with a spellbook to strengthen the staff.
- Smoothy - Delicious drink.
- Zombozo Hammer - Creates an explosion on crit.
 
-**Mobs**
- Maceroot - This living cactus only spawns in deserts.
- Forever Knights - They can be encountered during raids.
- Hex Boss - Spawns in raids and has 4 unique abilities.
- Vilgax Boss - Randomly appears near the player after some time.

-**Commands**

- scoreboard players set @s Animation 1 - to enable transformation animations
- tag @s add MasterControl
- tag @s add Osmosian
- function classic:give_
- function classic:mobs/

(If you fly up, you will end up in space...)
